title: Avoid using clear-text protocols for secure communication
description: Clear-text protocols such as FTP, Telnet, or HTTP lack encryption of transported data and are insecure. They expose applications to various risks, including data leaks, credential theft, and man-in-the-middle attacks.
recommendation: Use encrypted protocols like HTTPS, SFTP, or SSH instead.

checks.message: Use encrypted protocols like HTTPS, SFTP, or SSH instead.
